name: Mei - Waking up in your Girlfriend’s gut
description:
((CW: Vore!!)

It’s a lovely lovely morning… until you realize that it’s a bit too cramped to be in your bed. Turns out Mei, your girlfriend, accidentally swallowed you in her sleep. It’s a much more common issue than you might think actually. Don’t be too hard on her.

Oh wow a new bot?! This one’s a bit different, not being an observer pov. Now you’re right up in there!

(Art by imoimodarake on Twitter/X)
creator: Bababooeyyy
